mission.title: external-secrets: Namespace finalizer not getting cleaned up causing hanging namespace deleting
mission.description: Namespace finalizer not getting cleaned up causing hanging namespace deleting. This issue affects 9+ users.

steps.title: Identify external-secrets troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your external-secrets deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets -n external-secrets --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review external-secrets configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant external-secrets configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets
kubectl get configmap -n external-secrets -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=external-secrets
```
The namespace finalizer `externalsecrets.external-secrets.io/ces-<xyz>` is not getting cleaned up on namespace deletion, causing it to hang indefinitely 

**To Reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
```
    - apiVersion: v1
      kind: Secret

```

steps.title: Confirm Namespace finalizer not getting cleaned up… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=external-secrets -n external-secrets --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n external-secrets --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

What is the problem you're trying to solve?
Hopefully Fixes https://github.com/external-secrets/external-secrets/issues/5426
How do you like to solve the issue and why?

## Format

fix(scope): fix bug
docs(scope): update documentation
chore(scope): update build tool or
codeSnippets:
- apiVersion: v1
      kind: Secret
      metadata:
        name: &license-name nservicebus-license
        namespace: '{{ .Release.Namespace }}'
      stringData:
        license.xml: xyz

    - apiVersion: v1
      kind: ServiceAccount
      metadata:
        name: &auth-sa nsb-external-secrets
        namespace: '{{ .Release.Namespace }}'
    - apiVersion: rbac.authorization.k8s.io/v1
      kind: Role
      metadata:
        name: read-source-secret
        namespace: '{{ .Release.Namespace }}'
      rules:
      - apiGroups: [""]
        resourceNames:
        - *license-name
        resources:
        - secrets
        verbs:
        - get
        - list
        - watch
      - apiGroups:
        - authorization.k8s.io
        resources:
        - selfsubjectrulesreviews
        verbs
